data.title: Troilus Gold Corp. changes name to Troilus Mining Corp; ticker renamed to TSX: TLG, OTCQX: CHXMF; FSE: CM5R. Shareholder approval given at Dec. 4, 2025 Annual & Special Meeting.
data.description: Troilus Mining Corp., previously known as Troilus Gold Corp., has successfully changed its name to Troilus Mining Corp. and "Corporation minière Troilus" in French. This decision was made after receiving approval from shareholders at the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders on December 4, 2025. The company's stock symbols are TSX: TLG, OTCQX: CHXMF, and FSE: CM5R.
Koryx Copper gives project updates in Zambia: drill targets identified at Luanshya West, regional surface geochemistry at Mpongwe done.

data.title: Gaming and Leisure Properties updates $1.5 billion capital commitments for five major projects with four partners.
data.description: Wyomissing-based Gaming and Leisure Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GLPI) shared updates on progress milestones for five projects involving four partners, totaling around $1.5 billion in GLPI capital commitments. The projects include Caesars Republic Sonoma County, Bally’s Chicago, Bally’s Baton Rouge, PENN Entertainment’s M Resort, and Ione Band of Miwok Indians’ Acorn Ridge. The company highlighted recent developments related to these commitments.

data.title: Iridex Corp. (Nasdaq: IRIX) to present at Sidoti Year-End Virtual Investor Conference on Dec 05, 2025. Leader in laser medical systems for glaucoma and retinal diseases.
data.description: Iridex Corporation, a global leader in providing advanced laser medical equipment for treating glaucoma and retinal diseases, is set to take part in the upcoming Sidoti Year-End Virtual Investor Conference. The event is scheduled for December 05, 2025. Iridex Corporation is listed on Nasdaq with the symbol IRIX.

data.title: Signing Day Sports announces AI/HPC infrastructure opportunity; Chairman's shareholder letter released. Stock symbol: SGN.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Signing Day Sports, Inc. (NYSE American: SGN) headquartered in Scottsdale, AZ, published a shareholder letter from its Chairman and CEO, Daniel Nelson.

data.title: Gabriel Holding A/S discloses GAB Invest ApS transaction exceeding EUR 50,000 limit for 2025 under Market Abuse Regulation.
data.description: Gabriel Holding A/S has released details of a transaction as per Article 19 of the Market Abuse Regulation. GAB Invest ApS has surpassed the reporting threshold of EUR 50,000 for its total transactions in 2025 with this particular transaction.

data.title: Parsons Corp wins $3.5B contract with DTRA to counter weapons of mass destruction, 5yr base + 5yr option period.
data.description: Parsons Corporation revealed that it has been chosen by the Defense Threat Reduction Agency (DTRA) for the Cooperative Threat Reduction Integration Contract (CTRIC) IV. This significant contract highlights Parsons’ ongoing role in global threat reduction and security. The contract is an indefinite-delivery, indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) multiple award task order contract (MATOC) with a total value cap of $3.5 billion. It encompasses a five-year base period with the possibility of extending for an additional five years. This announcement reaffirms Parsons Corporation's position as a key player in international threat reduction and security efforts.

data.title: American Eagle Outfitters Inc's Q3 earnings beat failed to impress despite viral campaign; stock soars but quality score drops from 12.22 to 3.05 percentile week-on-week.
data.description: American Eagle Outfitters Inc. (NYSE: AEO) reported a third-quarter earnings surpassing expectations and achieved success with a viral marketing campaign featuring celebrities. However, despite a surge in stock price post-earnings, there are concerns about the company's fundamental performance. While the stock price rose, data from Benzinga Edge's Stock Rankings revealed a decline in AEO's quality score from the previous week, dropping from 12.22 percentile to a concerning 3.05 percentile. The quality ranking assesses a company's operational efficiency and historical profitability compared to industry peers. A rank of 3.05 signifies that AEO currently ranks in the bottom 5th percentile of stocks.

data.title: Lattice Semiconductor authorizes $250M stock repurchase program to enhance market leadership. #LSCC
data.description: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (Nasdaq: LSCC) has received approval from its Board of Directors to buyback $250 million worth of its common stock. Lorenzo Flores, the Chief Financial Officer, expressed confidence in the company's financial stability, stating that this move enables them to provide returns to shareholders and still focus on investments that enhance their dominance in Small and Mid-Range FPGAs, and advance their Companion.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets report on South Korea's colocation data center portfolio from 2025-2028 shows Seoul as focal point with multiple 100MW+ mega-campuses, 58 operational data centers, 850 MW IT load capacity, and top 3 operators: LG Uplus, KT Cloud, and SK broadband.
data.description: Dublin - A database titled "South Korea Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The forthcoming data centers in South Korea are primarily focused in Seoul, with prominent involvement from hyperscale and telecom operators. Development includes numerous mega-campuses exceeding 100MW in size. Presently, South Korea accommodates around 58 operational data centers, boasting a collective IT load capacity of about 850 MW. Leading the industry are LG Uplus, KT Cloud, and SK broadband.

data.title: Palantir and TWG AI partner with Teton Ridge, utilizing NVIDIA for real-time AI and computer vision in rodeo.
data.description: An innovative collaboration between Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) and TWG AI has been unveiled in Denver. Together, they are teaming up with Teton Ridge, a western sports and entertainment company supported by TWG Global, to introduce cutting-edge real-time AI and computer vision technology to the world of rodeo. This partnership aims to enhance and quicken the sport experience for athletes, fans, and partners. The venture will also involve NVIDIA in the endeavor. Teton Ridge, the proprietor of Cowboy Channel and associated western sports and media platforms, has been working alongside PRCA-sanctioned rodeos in the past year to conduct tests and trials for this new initiative.

data.title: HNI and Steelcase release initial merger consideration election results for Steelcase shareholders in Muscatine & Grand Rapids.
data.description: HNI and Steelcase have revealed preliminary results regarding the election of the merger consideration form for Steelcase shareholders. The announcement was made in Muscatine, Iowa, and Grand Rapids, Michigan. Key numbers from the announcement include the merger consideration options available for Steelcase shareholders.

data.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust releases 7th Corporate Sustainability Report in Bethesda, highlighting sustainability efforts.
data.description: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust, a Maryland-based real estate investment trust (REIT), has released its seventh annual Corporate Sustainability Report. This report highlights the company's commitment to sustainable practices and showcases its efforts to reduce its environmental impact. The report covers various initiatives undertaken by Pebblebrook Hotel Trust to promote sustainability, including energy-saving measures, waste reduction programs, and community engagement projects. This initiative demonstrates the company's dedication to corporate social responsibility.

The driver’s cab on an articulated lorry was left hanging off an icy West Virginia bridge after losing control in a major winter storm. Fire crews raced to hoist the trapped driver to safety as snow and ice snarl travel across the Northeast and mid-Atlantic.
